text_block_list.name: Umamusume
text_block_list.text: SH-SHE'S DEAD?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As I'm walking down the hallway, I<n>hear
ominous shrieks from<n>somewhere nearby! I rush
over in a<n>panic, only to find...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Man, who would've thought King's<n>food was
poisoned?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. We're terribly sorry to have<n>alarmed you,
but everything is under<n>control.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: It's a murder mystery game, amigo!<n>King's fine!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
They explain that the game involves<n>solving a
murder case based on the<n>clues given to each
individual player.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, right! We don't actually have a<n>GM
yet—that's "game master," by the<n>way. Would
you mind being ours?
choice_data_list: I guess I can do that...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: And so I find myself game-mastering<n>a murder.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
...Let's start with the circumstances<n>surrounding
our victim. King was<n>found in the evening,
collapsed in one<n>of the inn's guest rooms.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
The cause of death seems to be<n>poison mixed
into a bowl of egg<n>custard served with dinner.
Other than<n>that, there were reports of a loud
shattering sound just before King<n>died.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: A fittingly ominous start to a murder<n>mystery...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Geez, that's horrible... Who would do<n>such a
thing?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I don't believe we know each other<n>well enough
to judge that,<n>unfortunately.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Then let's get started by breakin' the<n>ice! First
off, self-introductions!<n>Ándale!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Shall we begin by detailing our roles,<n>and what
we've done today?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Um, I'm Special Week and I'm the<n>cook. Today, I
was toiling away<n>cooking up a feast for King!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
And I am a waitress who works at<n>the same inn!
I served King her meal.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Hola! I'm a traveling poet staying at<n>the inn! I got
acquainted with King<n>today, so I dropped by her
room to<n>hang out after her meal was served.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Heyyy, I'm a housekeeper at this inn,<n>and I've
been cleaning all day long.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
With everyone's introductions over, I<n>feel like
I've got a better picture of<n>the situation now.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Well, well... It seems that everyone is<n>suspicious.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Mm-hmm, you said it.
choice_data_list: What do you mean by that?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Spe could've added the poison while<n>she
prepared the meal, and Grass<n>could've spiked it
on the way to the<n>room.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Likewise, El could have snuck it in<n>when she
visited King, and Sei could<n>have tampered with
things while<n>cleaning.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: No way! I didn't add any poison!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Chillax. This is a game, remember?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah—has anything caught your<n>attention yet,
Trainer? You can go<n>ahead and forget about
being the GM<n>for a minute.
choice_data_list:
Were you cleaning during the evening as well,
Seiun Sky?
Poisoned or not, that stuff sure looks tasty...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yep, I'm a housekeeper after all. I do<n>try to stick
to places where there<n>aren't any guests around,
though.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: In fact, I barely spend any timearound the guests, so I'm not surewhy you're suspecting me.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky shrugs as she looks over<n>to the
collapsed King Halo. And right<n>then...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Wait, the bowl is a different<n>color! I know I
used a yellow one!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
My goodness, you're right. It was<n>yellow when I
delivered it as well.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But now it's in a blue bowl. Maybe<n>someone
came into the room and<n>swapped the bowls
around after it<n>was served?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Going by the introductions from<n>earlier, the only
one who came into<n>the room after the dish was
served<n>was El Condor Pasa...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Qué?! Me?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Everyone glances over at her with<n>accusing
eyes.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I know, right? I can't believe there's<n>poison in
there... And after Sei brought<n>me such nice
veggies to cook with,<n>too...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
It saddens me greatly that such<n>renowned
cuisine was used as a<n>means for murder...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Everyone looks over to the collapsed<n>King Halo
with bowed heads, when...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Wait, the bowl is a different<n>color! I know I
used a yellow one!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
My goodness, you're right. It was<n>yellow when I
delivered it as well.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But now it's in a blue bowl. Maybe<n>someone
came into the room and<n>swapped the bowls
around after it<n>was served?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Going by the introductions from<n>earlier, the only
one who came into<n>the room after the dish was
served<n>was El Condor Pasa...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Qué?! Me?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Everyone glances over at her with<n>accusing
eyes.
